en.monoTitle: / Everything you need to render PDFs
en.title: Epistola does templates and rendering — nothing else.
en.description: Keep workflows in the products that orchestrate your cases while Epistola focuses on perfect output.

features.title: Template lifecycle
features.body: Variants, immutable versions, and draft/publish/archived states per tenant with audit trails and schema migrations.

features.title: Visual editor
features.body: Drag-and-drop blocks with conditional logic, loops, live PDF preview, and inline expression chips.

features.title: Expression engine
features.body: Use flexible expressions to calculate totals, format values, and apply conditional logic. Define input variables per template.

features.title: Direct PDF renderer
features.body: Render PDF/A and PDF/X outputs directly — no HTML conversion step. Handles 10,000+ documents per minute on simple hardware.

features.title: Multi-tenant governance
features.body: Role-based access, environment promotions (staging/production), and per-tenant default themes keep teams isolated.

features.title: API + jobs
features.body: OpenAPI 3.1 REST endpoints for single or batch renders with adaptive job sizing, webhooks, and storage adapters.

nl.monoTitle: / Alles wat je nodig hebt om PDF's te renderen
nl.title: Epistola doet templates en rendering — niets anders.
nl.description: Houd workflows in de producten die je cases orkestreren terwijl Epistola zich richt op perfecte output.

features.title: Template levenscyclus
features.body: Varianten, onveranderlijke versies, en concept/publicatie/archief statussen per tenant met audit trails en schema migraties.

features.title: Visuele editor
features.body: Drag-and-drop blokken met conditionele logica, loops, live PDF preview, en inline expression chips.

features.title: Expression engine
features.body: Gebruik flexibele expressions om totalen te berekenen, waarden te formatteren, en conditionele logica toe te passen. Definieer input variabelen per template.

features.title: Directe PDF renderer
features.body: Render PDF/A en PDF/X output direct — geen HTML conversie stap. Verwerkt 10.000+ documenten per minuut op simpele hardware.

features.title: Multi-tenant governance
features.body: Rol-gebaseerde toegang, omgeving promoties (staging/productie), en per-tenant default themes houden teams geïsoleerd.

features.title: API + jobs
features.body: OpenAPI 3.1 REST endpoints voor single of batch renders met adaptive job sizing, webhooks, en storage adapters.
